message:
fix(sync): apply --ours/--theirs strategy to conflict resolution

resolveSyncConflicts determined the winner for each conflict but only
printed the result. MergeIssues was then re-run with original inputs,
re-applying default LWW merge and ignoring the user chosen strategy.

Now collects strategy winners and overrides the merge result for
conflicting issues after MergeIssues handles non-conflicting ones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
